description: Israeli AI company developing algorithms for automated analysis of medical imaging. Population health platform for early detection of conditions from CT scans, X-rays. Acquired by Nanox.
business_model: B2B - SaaS to hospitals and imaging centers
target_market: Global healthcare providers with radiology departments
key_investors: Acquired by Nanox; formerly backed by Khosla Ventures, Intermountain Healthcare
competitive_advantage: FDA-cleared algorithms, population health focus, acquisition by Nanox

varden_fit.rationale: AI diagnostic capability - could enhance occupational health screening
